name: Flydigi Vader 4 Pro
notes: 125-byte descriptor. Source: ShadowBlip/InputPlumber. DInput mode descriptor. 4 axes (8-bit), hat switch, 1 consumer button (Red Menu), 19 buttons, brake/accelerator triggers. No report ID in descriptor (single-report device). VID 0x04B4 is Cypress Semiconductor (Infineon).
